title: polygala longiloba
intro: Polygala longiloba, also known as Chinese milkwort, is a type of flowering plant in the Polygalaceae family, commonly found in China and other parts of East Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Polygala longiloba include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
